members.title: Members
members.removeConfirmBody: This member will lose access to the organization.

pending.title: Pending Invitations
pending.emptyDescription: Invite team members to collaborate in your organization.

dialog.title: Invite to {orgName}
dialog.description: Send an email invite or generate a shareable link.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

accept.invalidTitle: This invitation is no longer valid
accept.invalidBody: It may have been cancelled or already used. Contact the person who invited you for a new link.
accept.alreadyMember: You're already a member of this organization.
accept.declineConfirmBody: You can ask for a new invitation later if you change your mind.

cancel.confirmBody: This will revoke the invitation. The recipient will no longer be able to join using this invite.
